mainEntity.text: Steps to claim Perplexity visibility for Chicago multi-practice firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Audit queries. 2. Create city-specific content. 3. Add schema. 4. Build backlinks. 5. Track citations.

suggestedAnswer.text: Chicago firms segment by practice/city. Use lists/tables heavily.
